- **Owner Name: Rakshita Sharma**

**Date:** February 10, 2026

---

## 1. Requirements Description

---

### 1.1 Background and Objectives:
Sugarfit is a key business entity looking to optimize its payment infrastructure. This document outlines the functional and technical requirements for integrating Razorpay's payment solutions to enhance user experience and operational efficiency.

### 1.2 Business Requirement
**Merchant Name:** Sugarfit  
**Objective:** Integrate with **Razorpay Subscriptions** to facilitate seamless premium payments and recurring mandates.

---

## 2. Detailed Requirements

---

### 2.1 Technical Specifications
- **MID:** Pending
- **Integration type:** Subscriptions Integration
- **Platform:** Website
- **Backend Language:** Java (Spring Boot)
- **Product used:** Subscriptions
- **Payment methods:** UPI, Cards

### 2.2 Special Programs
There are no customized requirements at this stage.

### 2.3 Dependencies

#### 2.3.1 API Documentation
- [Subscriptions API Documentation](https://razorpay.com/docs/payments/subscriptions/apis/)

#### 2.3.2 Test Credentials
N/A (Shared internally)

#### 2.3.3 Technical Contacts
- **Rakshita Sharma** (Integrations POC, Razorpay)
- **Merchant Tech Team** (Merchant POC)

### 2.4 Configurations

#### 2.4.1 Test and Production Domains
- **Production:** N/A

#### 2.4.2 Additional Integration
NA

#### 2.4.3 Checkout Configuration
- **Automatic capture:** Done
- **Test payments:** Validated in test mode.

#### 2.4.4 Config code/IDs
None

#### 2.4.5 Webhook URLs and events
- **Events:** `payment.captured`, `payment.failed`

### 2.5 Process Flow

#### 2.5.1 Actors
- **User:** End user of the website.
- **Merchant:** Sugarfit.
- **Razorpay:** PG/PA.
- **Bank:** Debit processing and Mandate confirmation.

#### 2.5.2 Sequence Diagram (Subscriptions)

![Process Flow](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

## 3. Exception Scenarios

---

### 3.1 Error Handling
- **Consumption:** Errors (description/reason) are consumed by the merchant.
- **Hard-coding:** No hard-coding of error descriptions found.

### 3.2 Audit Findings
- All checked items are in good standing.

### 3.3 Checklist Link
### 3.4 Best Practice Suggestions
- ** Fetch APIs:** Suggested use of Fetch APIs for status reconciliation.
- ** Late Auth:** Discussed late authorization scenarios for robustness.

---

### 4 Integration Best Practices
- Verification via webhooks is the primary source of truth.
- Periodic reconciliation using Fetch APIs for edge cases.
